arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich boss Jürgen Klinsmann thinks Thomas Müller will rise to the occasion this week
arts.sum: If there is one person who is not doubting that outgoing club legend Thomas Müller can make an impact at Bayern Munich against Inter Milan and Borussia Dortmund this week, it is Jürgen Klinsmann. And I really hope from the bottom of my heart that there will be a real revival of Thomas Müller in these crucial weeks, and, of course, because they are currently hosting the final in their own stadium on May 31st in Munich with the Champions League.
